questions.question: Nail extension lagane se pehle nail plate ko disinfect karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Nail ko chamakdar banane ke liye
options.C: Extension ko jaldi sukhane ke liye
options.D: Client ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Nail plate ko disinfect karna infection aur fungal growth ko rokne ke liye bahut zaroori hai, taaki client ki safety bani rahe.

questions.question: Client consultation ke dauran kaun si information lena sabse mahatvapurna hai?

options.B: Client ki health history aur nail condition

questions.explanation: Client ki health history aur nail condition jaanna bahut zaroori hai taaki aap sahi treatment suggest kar sakein aur koi side effect na ho.

questions.question: Nail preparation mein cuticle ko gently push back karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Extension ko jyada der tak tikane ke liye
options.B: Nail bed ko chhota dikhane ke liye
options.D: Nail growth ko rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cuticle ko gently push back karne se nail plate saaf ho jaati hai, jisse product ki adhesion achhi hoti hai aur lifting ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Nail extension application se pehle nail surface ko dehydrate karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Extra oil aur moisture remove karta hai, adhesion badhata hai

questions.explanation: Dehydrator nail surface se natural oils aur moisture ko remove karta hai, jisse primer aur extension product ki grip achhi hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek nail technician ko apne tools ko kaise sanitize karna chahiye?

options.B: Har client ke baad disinfectant solution mein soak karke
options.D: Jab tools bahut dirty dikhein tab

questions.explanation: Har client ke baad tools ko properly disinfect karna infection spread rokne ke liye standard practice hai.

questions.question: Nail primer lagane ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Nail aur product ke beech adhesion ko improve karna

questions.explanation: Primer nail surface ko prepare karta hai aur extension product ke saath strong bond banane mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Nail dust ko remove karne ke liye kaun sa tool sabse effective hai?

options.B: Lint-free wipe ya dust brush

questions.explanation: Lint-free wipe ya dust brush filing ke baad nail dust ko effectively remove karte hain, taaki agla product smooth apply ho sake.

questions.question: Ek hygienic salon environment maintain karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Workstation, tools aur floors ko regular basis par clean aur sanitize karna

questions.explanation: Pura salon area, tools aur floors ko regular basis par clean aur sanitize karna client aur technician dono ki safety ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Nail extension ke liye nail files ka grit size kaise choose karte hain?

options.A: Jitna high grit, utna rough file
options.B: Jitna low grit, utna rough file
options.C: Grit size ka koi farak nahi padta
options.D: Sirf colour dekhkar choose karte hain

questions.explanation: Lower grit number (e.g., 80/100) coarse hota hai aur product remove karne ke liye use hota hai, jabki higher grit (e.g., 180/240) natural nail aur finishing ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Nail technician ko client ke saath professional relationship maintain karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Personal life ke baare mein sab kuch share karna
options.B: Client ki privacy respect karna aur boundaries maintain karna
options.D: Sirf kaam ki baat karna aur smile na karna

questions.explanation: Client ki privacy respect karna aur professional boundaries maintain karna ek strong aur trust-based client-technician relationship ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Kya pregnant client ko nail extensions lagana safe hai?

options.B: Bilkul unsafe hai
options.C: Doctor ki salah aur extra precautions ke saath potentially safe ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Pregnancy mein hormonal changes aur chemical fumes se sensitivity badh sakti hai. Doctor ki salah aur proper ventilation ke saath hi extensions lagane chahiye, aur agar client ko discomfort ho toh avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Nail prep mein cuticle remover ka sahi istemal kya hai?

options.B: Dead cuticle skin ko dissolve karke easily push back karne ke liye
options.C: Nail ko colour karne ke liye
options.D: Nail ko polish karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cuticle remover dead skin ko soften karta hai, jisse use gently push back karna aasaan ho jaata hai bina nail plate ko damage kiye.

questions.question: Nail extension ke liye tips choose karte samay kya dhyan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Tip ka size aur shape natural nail se match karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Tip ka size aur shape natural nail se perfectly match hona chahiye, taaki seamless blend bane aur lifting na ho.

questions.question: Nail extension application ke baad client ko kya aftercare advice deni chahiye?

options.A: Ghar jakar turant extensions nikal dein
options.B: Nails ko tools ki tarah use karein
options.C: Regular refills karwayein aur cuticle oil use karein
options.D: Hot water mein jyada der tak haath rakhein

questions.explanation: Regular refills aur cuticle oil ka istemal extensions ki longevity aur natural nails ki health ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko extension lagane ke baad discomfort ya pain ho, toh technician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant extensions remove karna aur reason investigate karna
options.C: Thodi der wait karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Discomfort ya pain serious issue ka sign ho sakta hai. Extensions remove karke cause pata karna aur medical advice recommend karna technician ki responsibility hai.

questions.question: Nail technician ke liye PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Gloves, mask aur safety glasses

questions.explanation: Gloves, mask aur safety glasses technician ko chemical fumes, dust aur potential infections se protect karte hain.

questions.question: Nail extension services ke liye proper ventilation kyun critical hai?

options.A: Products ko jaldi sukhane ke liye
options.B: Chemical fumes se hone wale health risks ko kam karne ke liye
options.C: Salon ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.D: Client ko fresh feel karwane ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation chemical fumes ko dilute karta hai aur unke inhalation se hone wale respiratory issues aur health risks ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Nail matrix ka kya function hai?

options.B: Nail plate produce karna

questions.explanation: Nail matrix nail plate ko banata hai. Yeh nail growth ka source hai.

questions.question: Eponychium kis part ko kehte hain?

options.B: Nail plate ke side ki skin
options.C: Cuticle ke upar ki living skin

questions.explanation: Eponychium living skin hoti hai jo nail plate ke base par cuticle ko cover karti hai. Ise kabhi kaatna nahi chahiye.

questions.question: Onychomycosis kya hai?

options.B: Nail fungus infection

questions.explanation: Onychomycosis nails ka fungal infection hai, jisme nail discoloured, thick aur brittle ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar client ko paronychia (nail fold infection) ho, toh kya nail extensions lagane chahiye?

options.B: Nahin, infection theek hone tak avoid karna chahiye
options.D: Thoda sa lagakar check karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Paronychia ek bacterial ya fungal infection hai. Is condition mein extensions lagane se infection badh sakta hai ya client ko pain ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Leuconychia ka matlab kya hai?

options.B: Nail par white spots ya lines

questions.explanation: Leuconychia nail plate par white discoloration hai, jo aksar minor trauma ya zinc deficiency ke karan hota hai. Yeh usually harmless hota hai.

questions.question: Nail bed ka kya function hai?

options.B: Nail ko grow karna

questions.explanation: Nail bed nail plate ko support deta hai aur usse joda rakhta hai.

questions.question: Onycholysis kya hai?

options.B: Nail plate ka nail bed se alag hona

questions.explanation: Onycholysis mein nail plate nail bed se detach ho jaati hai, jo trauma, infection ya allergic reaction ke karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Nail technician ko sharp objects (jaise nippers, files) use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Sirf client ke liye gloves pehnane chahiye
options.C: Carefully use karna aur gloves pehnana, proper disposal bhi zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Sharp objects ko carefully use karna chahiye taaki client aur technician dono ko injury na ho. Gloves pehnana aur used sharps ko puncture-proof container mein dispose karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Kya nail technician ko client ke nails par koi suspicious growth ya mole dikhe toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Ignor karke extension laga dena chahiye
options.B: Client ko doctor se consult karne ki salah deni chahiye
options.C: Khud se diagnose karke treatment dena chahiye
options.D: Us par extra product laga kar chhupa dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Nail technician ko medical conditions diagnose nahi karni chahiye. Agar koi suspicious growth dikhe toh client ko professional medical advice lene ki salah deni chahiye.

questions.question: Hyponychium kahan located hota hai?

options.B: Nail plate ke neeche, free edge ke paas

questions.explanation: Hyponychium nail plate ke neeche, free edge aur nail bed ke beech ki skin hoti hai. Yeh nail bed ko infection se protect karti hai.

questions.question: Nail technicians ke liye chemical safety ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Proper ventilation, PPE ka istemal aur MSDS ko follow karna
options.C: Chemicals ko khuli hawa mein rakhna

questions.explanation: Chemical safety mein proper ventilation, Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) ka istemal aur Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) mein di gayi guidelines ko follow karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Bloodborne pathogens se bachne ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Universal precautions ko follow karna (gloves, disinfected tools, etc.)
options.D: Sirf new client ke liye precaution lena

questions.explanation: Universal precautions ka matlab hai har client ko potential source of infection maankar treat karna aur protective measures lena, jaise gloves pehnana aur tools ko properly disinfect karna.

questions.question: Agar client ko severe nail fungal infection ho, toh technician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Fungal infection par acrylic lagana chahiye
options.B: Service refuse karni chahiye aur doctor se consult karne ki salah deni chahiye

questions.explanation: Severe fungal infection par extension lagane se infection badh sakta hai aur client ko nuksan ho sakta hai. Technician ko service refuse karke client ko medical professional ke paas bhejna chahiye.

questions.question: Nail plate kis cheez se bani hoti hai?

options.B: Keratin

questions.explanation: Nail plate ek hard protective layer hoti hai jo keratin naam ke protein se bani hoti hai.

questions.question: Kon si condition mein nail extensions lagana contraindicated hai?

options.B: Nail fungus ya open wounds

questions.explanation: Nail fungus ya open wounds hone par nail extensions nahi lagane chahiye kyunki isse infection badh sakta hai aur healing mein problem aa sakti hai.

questions.question: Sterilization ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Sabhi microorganisms ko destroy karna

questions.explanation: Sterilization ek process hai jisme sabhi microorganisms, including spores, ko destroy kiya jaata hai. Disinfection se zyada effective hai.

questions.question: Gel nail extensions ko cure karne ke liye kis light ka istemal hota hai?

options.B: UV ya LED lamp

questions.explanation: Gel products photoinitiators contain karte hain jo UV ya LED light ke exposure se harden (cure) hote hain.

questions.question: Builder gel ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Nail extension ki strength aur structure banana

questions.explanation: Builder gel ek thick gel hota hai jo nail extension ko shape aur strength dene ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Gel extension lagane ke baad sticky layer ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Inhibition layer

questions.explanation: Gel cure hone ke baad ek sticky, uncured layer chhodta hai, jise inhibition layer kehte hain. Isse cleanser se remove kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Kya gel extensions ko acetone se remove kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Sirf soft gel ya soak-off gel ko
options.C: Kisi bhi gel extension ko nahi

questions.explanation: Soft gel ya soak-off gel ko acetone mein soak karke remove kiya ja sakta hai, jabki hard gel ko file off karna padta hai.

questions.question: Gel extension refill kitne time baad karna chahiye?

options.B: Har 2-3 hafte mein
options.D: Jab tak nail toot na jaaye

questions.explanation: Natural nail growth ke karan, gel extensions ko har 2-3 hafte mein refill karna zaroori hota hai, taaki lifting na ho aur nail balance bana rahe.

questions.question: Gel extension application mein C-curve ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Nail ko colourful banane ke liye
options.B: Nail ko strength aur durability dene ke liye
options.C: Nail ko chhota dikhane ke liye
options.D: Nail ko chamakdar banane ke liye

questions.explanation: C-curve nail extension ko uski strength aur structure deta hai, jisse woh breakage aur lifting se bache rehte hain. Yeh nail ki natural arch ko mimic karta hai.

questions.question: Gel extension ke liye kaun sa lamp faster curing deta hai?

options.B: LED lamp

questions.explanation: LED lamps generally UV lamps se faster curing provide karte hain aur unki lifespan bhi zyada hoti hai.

questions.question: Gel overlay kya hota hai?

options.A: Natural nail par gel ki thin layer
options.B: Nail tip par gel ki thick layer

questions.explanation: Gel overlay natural nail ko strengthen aur protect karne ke liye gel ki thin layer hoti hai, bina length add kiye.

questions.question: Gel extension lagane ke liye nail forms ka kya use hai?

options.A: Nail ko colour karne ke liye
options.B: Extension ki length aur shape ko sculpt karne ke liye
options.C: Nail ko clean karne ke liye
options.D: Nail ko dry karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Nail forms paper ya plastic ke stencils hote hain jo natural nail ke neeche lagaye jaate hain taaki gel se free edge ko sculpt kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Gel extension mein heat spike kyun hota hai?

options.B: Gel ke curing process ke dauran exothermic reaction ke karan
options.D: Client ka haath bahut garam hone par

questions.explanation: Gel ke molecules cure hote samay heat release karte hain (exothermic reaction). Agar gel ki layer bahut thick ho ya client ki nail plate sensitive ho, toh heat spike feel ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Hard gel aur soak-off gel mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Hard gel shine deta hai, soak-off gel nahi
options.B: Hard gel file-off hota hai aur soak-off gel acetone se remove hota hai
options.C: Hard gel sirf colour hota hai, soak-off gel clear

questions.explanation: Hard gel bahut durable hota hai aur sirf file karke remove kiya ja sakta hai. Soak-off gel (soft gel) flexible hota hai aur acetone mein soak karke remove ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Gel extension application ke baad filing ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Nail ko smooth aur desired shape dena

questions.explanation: Filing se gel extension ko final shape di jaati hai, surface smooth kiya jaata hai, aur apex, C-curve ko perfect banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Gel top coat lagane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: High shine, durability aur protection provide karna

questions.explanation: Gel top coat final layer hoti hai jo extension ko high shine, scratch resistance aur colour protection deti hai.

questions.question: Agar gel extension mein lifting ho, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Gel bahut patla lagaya gaya
options.C: Client ne bahut zyada pani piya

questions.explanation: Lifting ka sabse common reason improper nail preparation hai, jaise cuticle theek se clean na karna, nail surface ko dehydrate na karna, ya primer theek se na lagana.

questions.question: Gel extension mein apex point kahan banana chahiye?

options.B: Nail ke centre mein ya stress area ke thoda aage

questions.explanation: Apex point nail extension ka highest point hota hai, jo nail ke stress area (jahan free edge aur natural nail milte hain) ko strength provide karta hai, uske thoda aage banana chahiye.

questions.question: Gel extensions ke liye kaun sa brush use karte hain?

options.B: Fan brush

questions.explanation: Gel ko apply aur sculpt karne ke liye synthetic bristles wale flat ya oval brushes use kiye jaate hain, kyunki gel natural hair brushes ko damage kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Gel extension removal ke baad natural nails ko kaise care karni chahiye?

options.B: Cuticle oil lagana aur nail strengthener use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Removal ke baad nails thode weak ho sakte hain. Cuticle oil se nourish karna aur nail strengthener use karna unki recovery ke liye helpful hai.

questions.question: Acrylic nail extensions mein monomer aur polymer ka kya role hai?

options.A: Monomer liquid hai aur polymer powder hai, jo milkar extension banate hain
options.B: Monomer colour deta hai aur polymer shine

questions.explanation: Monomer ek liquid hai aur polymer ek powder. Jab ye dono mix hote hain, toh ek chemical reaction hota hai jo acrylic bead banata hai aur harden ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Acrylic bead banate samay sahi liquid-to-powder ratio kyun important hai?

options.B: Proper curing, strength aur workability ke liye
options.D: Kam product use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi ratio se acrylic na toh bahut runny hoga na bahut dry, jisse application smooth hogi, proper cure hoga aur extension strong banega.

questions.question: Acrylic extensions ko remove karne ka sabse common method kya hai?

options.B: Acetone mein soak karna

questions.explanation: Acrylic extensions ko acetone mein soak karke soften kiya jaata hai aur phir gently scrape off kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Acrylic brush ko clean karne ka best tarika kya hai?

options.B: Brush cleaner ya monomer mein dip karke saaf karna

questions.explanation: Acrylic brush ko specially designed brush cleaner ya clean monomer mein dip karke saaf karna chahiye taaki product brush mein harden na ho.

questions.question: Acrylic application mein 'apex' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Nail extension ka highest stress point

questions.explanation: Apex nail extension ka highest point hota hai, jo nail ke stress area ko strength provide karta hai, jisse breakage ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Acrylic extensions mein 'lifting' ko kaise prevent kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Proper nail preparation aur product application karke

questions.explanation: Lifting ko rokne ke liye nail prep (cuticle clean, dehydrate, primer) aur product application (sahi ratio, thin layers, no flooding cuticles) bahut important hai.

questions.question: Acrylic application ke liye kitne beads ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.A: Sirf ek bead pure nail ke liye
options.B: Usually 2-3 beads (cuticle, stress area, free edge) for proper structure

questions.explanation: Acrylic ko typically 2-3 beads mein apply kiya jaata hai – pehla cuticle area ke paas, doosra stress area par (apex ke liye), aur teesra free edge ko sculpt karne ke liye.

questions.question: Kya acrylic extensions ko UV lamp mein cure karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Nahin, acrylic air dry hota hai

questions.explanation: Acrylic extensions air dry hote hain, unhe UV ya LED lamp ki zaroorat nahi hoti hai. Lamp sirf gel products ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Acrylic extensions mein 'filing' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Rough edges aur uneven surface ko smooth karna aur shape dena

questions.explanation: Filing se acrylic extension ko final desired shape di jaati hai, surface ko smooth kiya jaata hai aur apex, C-curve ko perfect banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Acrylic application ke dauran monomer ki strong smell ko kam karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Proper ventilation aur odur-absorbing products use karna

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation system, exhaust fans aur activated charcoal filters jaise odur-absorbing products monomer ki smell ko kam karne mein helpful hote hain.

questions.question: Nail tips ko apply karte samay 'well' area ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Tip ka woh area jo natural nail se judta hai

questions.explanation: Tip ka 'well' woh indented area hota hai jo natural nail ke free edge par perfectly fit hota hai, jisse seamless blend banta hai.

questions.question: Agar acrylic extension bahut thick ho jaaye, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Natural look nahi aayega aur lifting ka risk badh jayega

questions.explanation: Bahut thick acrylic unnatural lagta hai aur stress points par lifting ka risk badha deta hai. Proper sculpting aur filing se thickness maintain karni chahiye.

questions.question: Acrylic refill ke dauran kya steps follow kiye jaate hain?

options.A: Pura acrylic nikal kar naya lagana
options.B: Old product ko file down karna, lift ko remove karna, aur new product apply karna

questions.explanation: Refill mein grow-out area ko fill kiya jaata hai, lifting ko remove kiya jaata hai aur nail ko rebalance kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Acrylic application mein pinch tool ka kya use hai?

options.B: Acrylic ko cure karna
options.C: C-curve ko enhance karna aur slim look dena

questions.explanation: Pinch tool acrylic harden hone se pehle sides se gently pinch karke C-curve ko aur zyada pronounced banata hai, jisse nail slim aur elegant lagta hai.

questions.question: Acrylic extensions ki durability kitni hoti hai agar proper care ki jaaye?

options.B: 2-3 hafte tak refill ki zaroorat padti hai, lekin overall 4-6 hafte tak reh sakte hain

questions.explanation: Acrylic extensions bahut durable hote hain, lekin natural nail growth ke karan har 2-3 hafte mein refills ki zaroorat padti hai. Proper care ke saath yeh kaafi lambe chalte hain.

questions.question: Kya acrylic extensions natural nails ko damage karte hain?

options.B: Agar improper application ya removal ho toh damage ho sakta hai
options.D: Sirf agar colour acrylic ho toh

questions.explanation: Proper application aur removal techniques follow karne se natural nails ko minimal damage hota hai. Damage tab hota hai jab nails ko peel off kiya jaata hai ya over-filing hoti hai.

questions.question: Acrylic powder mein 'MMA' ka istemal kyun avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Yeh bahut hard hota hai, remove karna mushkil hota hai aur health risks ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Methyl Methacrylate (MMA) bahut hard hota hai, jisse remove karna mushkil hota hai aur natural nails ko severe damage ho sakta hai. Iske fumes bhi health ke liye harmful ho sakte hain. EMA (Ethyl Methacrylate) preferred choice hai.

questions.question: French tip extension mein 'smile line' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: White tip aur pink/nude base ke beech ki curve line

questions.explanation: Smile line woh distinct, curved boundary hoti hai jo French tip ke white free edge ko nail bed ke pink/nude portion se separate karti hai.

questions.question: Ombre nail design banane ke liye kaun si technique use karte hain?

options.B: Do ya do se zyada colours ko blend karna

questions.explanation: Ombre design mein do ya do se zyada colours ko smoothly blend kiya jaata hai, jisse gradient effect aata hai.

questions.question: Nail art mein encapsulation ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Glitter, dried flowers ya dusre items ko gel ya acrylic ke andar embed karna

questions.explanation: Encapsulation technique mein decorative items ko extension product (gel ya acrylic) ki layers ke beech seal kar diya jaata hai, jisse ek smooth finish milti hai.

questions.question: 3D nail art banane ke liye kaun sa product use karte hain?

options.B: Thick gel ya acrylic powder aur monomer ka mix

questions.explanation: 3D nail art ke liye special, thicker gels ya acrylic powder-monomer mix use kiya jaata hai jise sculpt karke raised designs banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar client ki nail extension lift ho jaaye, toh technician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Lifted area ko glue se chipka dena
options.B: Lifted area ko gently file off karna aur refill ya repair karna

questions.explanation: Lifted area ko proper tareeke se file off karna aur phir us area ko refill ya repair karna zaroori hai, taaki moisture trap na ho aur infection na ho.

questions.question: Stiletto nail shape ki kya pehchan hai?

options.B: Pointed tip

questions.explanation: Stiletto nails lambe aur bahut pointed hote hain, jo ek dagger ya stiletto heel ki tarah dikhte hain.

questions.question: Reverse French technique mein kya hota hai?

options.A: White tip ko pehle banate hain
options.B: Pink/nude base ko pehle sculpt karte hain aur smile line banate hain, phir white tip fill karte hain
options.C: Sirf ek colour use karte hain

questions.explanation: Reverse French mein pehle nail bed ko extend kiya jaata hai aur smile line ko create kiya jaata hai, phir white ya coloured free edge ko fill kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Nail extension brittle ho kar toot rahe hain, iska kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Product ka galat ratio, improper application ya over-filing
options.C: Client ki diet acchi nahi hai

questions.explanation: Brittle nails improper product ratio, thin application, ya over-filing ke karan ho sakte hain, jisse extension ki inherent strength kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Marble nail art banane ke liye kaun si technique use karte hain?

options.B: Wet nail polish/gel ko mix karke swirl effect create karna

questions.explanation: Marble effect banane ke liye do ya do se zyada wet nail polishes ya gels ko gently mix karke swirl kiya jaata hai, jisse marble jaisa pattern banta hai.

questions.question: Coffin nail shape ki kya visheshta hai?

options.B: Tapered sides aur square/flat tip

questions.explanation: Coffin (ya Ballerina) nails mein sides taper hoti hain aur free edge flat ya square hota hai, jo ek coffin box ki tarah dikhta hai.

questions.question: Nail art brushes ko clean aur maintain kaise karte hain?

options.B: Proper brush cleaner ya acetone se saaf karke, aur unki shape maintain karna

questions.explanation: Nail art brushes ko har use ke baad proper cleaner se saaf karna aur unki original shape mein store karna unki lifespan badhata hai.

questions.question: Agar gel extension yellow ho jaaye, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Client ne bahut zyada dhoop mein rehna
options.B: Poor quality gel, over-curing ya sun exposure
options.D: Client ne galti se yellow colour choose kar liya

questions.explanation: Yellowing poor quality gel, over-curing, ya excessive UV light (sunlight ya tanning beds) ke exposure ke karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Nail drilling machine (E-file) use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Low speed par start karna, light pressure use karna aur over-heating se bachna
options.C: Ek hi jagah par jyada der tak ghisna

questions.explanation: E-file ko low speed par start karna, light pressure use karna aur continuous contact se bachna zaroori hai, taaki friction heat na bane aur nail bed damage na ho.

questions.question: Chrome effect nails kaise banate hain?

options.B: Special chrome powder ko no-wipe top coat par buff karke

questions.explanation: Chrome effect ke liye, ek no-wipe gel top coat ko cure karne ke baad, us par chrome powder ko buff kiya jaata hai, aur phir ek aur top coat lagate hain.

questions.question: Agar client ko extension ke neeche green spot dikhe toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Yeh 'greenie' Pseudomonas bacteria infection ho sakta hai; extension remove karke client ko doctor se consult karne ki salah deni chahiye
options.C: Us par aur product laga dena chahiye
options.D: Sirf colour change kar dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Green spot Pseudomonas bacterial infection ka sign ho sakta hai. Extension turant remove karna chahiye aur client ko medical professional ke paas bhejna chahiye. Is par koi product nahi lagana chahiye.

questions.question: Acrylic nail art (e.g., flowers, bows) banane ke liye kya technique use karte hain?

options.B: Chhote acrylic beads ko sculpt karna

questions.explanation: 3D acrylic art mein chhote acrylic beads ko lekar brush se sculpt kiya jaata hai, jisse raised designs banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Nail shape mein 'Almond' aur 'Oval' mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Almond thoda zyada pointed hota hai jabki Oval rounder hota hai

questions.explanation: Oval nails sides se round aur free edge par bhi round hote hain. Almond nails bhi sides se tapered hote hain lekin free edge par thoda zyada pointed hote hain, badam jaisa shape.

questions.question: Nail technician ko apne services ki pricing kaise set karni chahiye?

options.B: Cost of materials, time spent, experience, aur market demand ko dhyan mein rakhkar

questions.explanation: Pricing set karte samay saare expenses (material, rent, electricity), technician ka time aur skill, aur local market rates ko consider karna chahiye.

questions.question: Client retention ke liye kya sabse important hai?

options.B: Excellent customer service, quality work aur consistent communication

questions.explanation: Achhi customer service, high-quality work aur regular follow-up clients ko wapas aane ke liye encourage karte hain.

questions.question: Social media par apne nail art work ko promote karne ka sabse effective tarika kya hai?

options.B: High-quality photos aur videos of nail art, hashtags aur engaging captions use karna

questions.explanation: Visually appealing content, relevant hashtags aur engaging storytelling social media par aapke kaam ko jyada logon tak pahunchata hai.

questions.question: Client record card mein kaun si information honi chahiye?

options.B: Client ka contact info, medical history, service history aur product preferences

questions.explanation: Client record card personal contact details, health conditions, previous services, aur client ki pasand ko track karne ke liye invaluable hai.

questions.question: Salon mein ek professional environment maintain karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Cleanliness, punctuality, aur courteous behavior maintain karna
options.D: Client ke saamne dusre staff se jhagadna

questions.explanation: Professionalism mein cleanliness, time par kaam karna, aur clients ke saath respectful tareeke se baat karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Inventory management ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Products ki availability track karna, wastage kam karna aur profit badhana

questions.explanation: Effective inventory management se aapko pata rehta hai ki kaun sa product kab order karna hai, jisse stockout ya expiry se bacha ja sakta hai aur cost control hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek nail technician ko apne skills ko upgrade karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Regularly naye courses, workshops attend karna aur latest trends follow karna

questions.explanation: Beauty industry hamesha evolve hoti rehti hai, isliye naye skills seekhna aur trends ko follow karna professional growth ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar client late ho jaaye toh technician ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Client ko service refuse kar dena
options.B: Gracefully accommodate karna agar possible ho, ya reschedule karna
options.D: Apni service ki speed badha dena

questions.explanation: Professionalism yahi hai ki agar schedule allow kare toh accommodate karein, warna polite tareeke se reschedule karein, bina client ko uncomfortable feel karaye.

questions.question: Online presence banane ke liye kaun sa platform sabse zyada useful hai nail technicians ke liye?

options.B: Instagram, Facebook aur Google My Business

questions.explanation: Instagram aur Facebook visual content ke liye perfect hain, aur Google My Business local search visibility ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Client feedback lena kyun important hai?

options.B: Services ko improve karne, client satisfaction badhane aur business grow karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko busy rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Constructive feedback se aap apni strengths aur weaknesses ko pehchan sakte hain, aur apni services ko continuously refine kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein emergency preparedness plan mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: First aid kit, emergency contact numbers, aur evacuation plan

questions.explanation: Emergency preparedness plan mein safety equipment, emergency contacts aur clear evacuation procedures shamil hone chahiye taaki kisi bhi unforeseen situation ko handle kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Kya nail technician ko client ki personal information ko confidential rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Haan, hamesha confidential rakhna chahiye

questions.explanation: Client ki personal information aur health details ko confidential rakhna professional ethics ka hissa hai aur trust build karta hai.

questions.question: Salon ke liye insurance cover lena kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf paisa kharch karne ke liye
options.B: Accidents, injuries ya property damage ke against financial protection ke liye
options.D: Salon ko bada dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Liability insurance salon ko unforeseen events, jaise client injury ya property damage se hone wale financial losses se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Ek successful nail technician banne ke liye kaun si quality sabse important hai?

options.B: Skill, creativity, professionalism aur good communication
options.D: Sirf social media par famous hona

questions.explanation: Skill aur creativity ke saath-saath, professionalism aur effective communication client trust aur repeat business ke liye crucial hain.

questions.question: Nail services ke liye cancellation policy kyun honi chahiye?

options.A: Client ko pareshan karne ke liye
options.B: Technician ke time aur revenue ko protect karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf advance payment lene ke liye

questions.explanation: Cancellation policy technician ke time aur income ko protect karti hai, khas kar jab client last minute par cancel ya no-show karte hain.

questions.question: Apne business ko expand karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf ek hi service provide karna
options.B: Nayi services add karna, marketing efforts badhana aur loyal client base develop karna

questions.explanation: Business expansion ke liye naye services introduce karna, effective marketing strategies apnana aur existing clients ke saath strong relationship banana bahut zaroori hai.
